about.leadBody: is a printing business based in Nepal offering quality print solutions for retail and wholesale customers.
about.subBody: We specialize in vinyl and flex printing, sublimation cups and materials, custom trophies, medals, table stands, and much more. Whether you need a single piece or a bulk wholesale order, we deliver quality every time.

products.name: Vinyl & Flex Printing
products.desc: High-quality vinyl banners, flex prints, standees, stickers, and custom signage for indoor and outdoor use.

products.name: Sublimation
products.desc: Sublimation mugs, cups, t-shirts, photo frames, and personalized items with vivid, long-lasting colors.

products.name: Trophies & Medals
products.desc: Custom trophies, medals, plaques, and recognition items for sports, corporate events, and ceremonies.

products.name: Table Stands
products.desc: Acrylic and metal table stands, menu holders, nameplates, and display accessories for businesses.

section5.title: Our Product Categories
section5.subtitle: Everything you need in one place — from printing machines to finished products, retail and wholesale.

categories.name: Flex & Vinyl Printing
categories.desc: Large format flex banners, vinyl stickers, standees and outdoor signage

categories.name: Sublimation Products
categories.desc: Sublimation mugs, cups, t-shirts, phone cases and photo frames

categories.name: Trophies & Medals
categories.desc: Custom trophies, medals, plaques and certificates for any occasion

section6.quote: We make quality printing accessible and affordable for every business and individual.

values.title: Quality
values.desc: Premium materials and professional equipment on every order

values.title: Creative
values.desc: Custom designs and creative solutions for unique requirements

values.title: Affordable
values.desc: Competitive pricing for retail and wholesale customers
